name: Gelato Di Ricotta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the powdered sugar and Marsala wine until the sugar dissolves.
2. Push the ricotta through a sieve into the mixture and stir well to combine.
3. Chill the mixture thoroughly in the refrigerator.
4. When ready to proceed, whip the cream until it reaches soft peaks.
5. Gently fold the whipped cream into the chilled ricotta mixture.
6. Transfer the mixture to an ice cream machine and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.
7. Makes 1 quart.
8. Tom Marella and Diane Darrow - Prodigy Guest Chefs Cookbook
